creator: nemysis@FreeBSD.org
text:
- Bump PORTREVISION
- Add patch, fix creation of manpages
- Update WWW


Without this patch i get

reading sources... [100%] tutorials/SlideAndPinJoint
looking for now-outdated files... none found
pickling environment... done
checking consistency... done
writing... pymunk.1 { readme news installation pymunk pymunk.constraint pymunk.vec2d pymunk.util pymunk.pygame_util pymunk.pyglet_util pymunkoptions examples tutorials tutorials/Arrows tutorials/SlideAndPinJoint advanced license } 
Exception occurred:
  File "/usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/docutils/writers/manpage.py", line 865, in dedent
    self._indent.pop()
IndexError: pop from empty list
The full traceback has been saved in /tmp/sphinx-err-WgnFUj.log, if you want to report the issue to the developers.
Please also report this if it was a user error, so that a better error message can be provided next time.
Either send bugs to the mailing list at <http://groups.google.com/group/sphinx-dev/>,
or report them in the tracker at <http://bitbucket.org/birkenfeld/sphinx/issues/>. Thanks!
*** [man] Error code 1



With this patch get

reading sources... [100%] tutorials/SlideAndPinJoint
looking for now-outdated files... none found
pickling environment... done
checking consistency... done
writing... pymunk.1 { readme news installation pymunk pymunk.constraint pymunk.vec2d pymunk.util pymunk.pygame_util pymunk.pyglet_util pymunkoptions examples tutorials tutorials/Arrows tutorials/SlideAndPinJoint advanced license } 
build succeeded.

Build finished. The manual pages are in build/man.
install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 /usr/local/ports/local/In-Review/devel/py-pymunk/work/pymunk-4.0.0/docs/src/build/man/pymunk.1 /usr/local/ports/local/In-Review/devel/py-pymunk/work/stage/usr/local/man/man1/



This patch is needed for upcoming Port devel/py-pymunk

Olivier Duchateau please give this PR to maintainer Li-Wen Hsu.
